title: Craftable Wither Skulls
description: Adds the ability to craft wither skulls in minecraft rather than going to a nether fortress to farm them.
body:
Craft Wither Skeleton Skulls using a simple custom recipe!

This datapack is designed for peaceful servers, worlds with disabled Nether Fortresses, or players who simply don’t want to spend hours grinding skull drops. It makes progressing toward beacons and summoning the Wither much more accessible, while still keeping gameplay fair and survival-friendly.

# ✨ Features

1. 🧩 Simple custom crafting recipe
1. ⏩ Easy to get materials to ease the grind
1. 🧭 Works great for servers and singleplayer worlds
1. 🔁 No command spam or performance impact
1. 🎮 Keeps survival gameplay meaningful while reducing grind

 ⚠️ Compatibility Note:
If Minecraft shows this datapack as incompatible, don’t worry — it still works perfectly on all supported versions.
This is only a version warning and does not affect functionality.

# 🧾 Recipe
![Crafting Box With The Recipe 4x coal 1x bone block 4x soul sand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaf03a2d3fb8503f0834064dd83b7ef7b70d2e99.png)

# 📥 Installation:
### 🗂️ Datapack Method (Vanilla / Servers)
- Download the .zip file
- Open your world folder:
- Singleplayer: .minecraft/saves/YourWorld/
- Server: your world directory
- Go into the datapacks folder
- Drag and drop the .zip file (do NOT unzip it)

In-game, run:


```
/reload
```


Confirm it loaded:


```
/datapack list
```

⚙️ Mod Loader Method (Forge / Fabric / Quilt / NeoForge)

Install your preferred loader:
- Forge
- Fabric
- Quilt
- NeoForge

Download the **.jar version**
Open your .minecraft folder
Place the file into the mods folder
Launch Minecraft using the correct mod loader profile. If using Fabric you will need to install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
🎮 Enjoy!

If you have feedback, suggestions, or issues, feel free to reach out or check updates on the project page.
